# Vrindaelys

> Vrindaelys is a product engineering studio that builds full-stack software, AI agents, WhatsApp & voice automation, and SEO/AEO growth tools for businesses worldwide. We write the code, deploy the infrastructure, and monitor the dashboards — a technical partner, not a vendor.

## About
- Vrindaelys engineers performant digital products, platforms, and systems end-to-end: strategy, design, development, infrastructure, and growth.
- Clients: CTOs, engineering leads, and founders who need production-grade systems.
- Contact: contact@vrindaelys.com | +91 620 968 9309
- Website: https://www.vrindaelys.com/

## Products
- Telemetry — Industry-specific AI growth optimization. Tracks user behavior page-by-page with live, country-wise, and periodic traffic charts plus AI insights that automatically optimize a site for search visibility.
- Proxy — An intelligent, multi-channel autonomous AI agent. Handles inbound voice calls and WhatsApp conversations naturally, scheduling appointments and qualifying leads 24/7.
- Root — In development (coming soon).

## Services
- Product Strategy & Design — research, wireframes, prototypes, design systems.
- Full-Stack Development — React, Next.js, Node.js, Python; APIs, databases, real-time systems.
- AI & Automation — intelligent agents, WhatsApp bots, calling systems, AI-powered optimization.
- SEO, AEO & Growth — search engine optimization, answer engine optimization, data-driven growth.

## Industries
- Healthcare, CRM/Enterprise, EdTech, Restaurants, Hospitality, E-commerce/Retail, Finance/Insurance, and more.
